description: Senior Full-Stack Software Engineer with 6+ years of experience designing, modernising, and scaling high-volume distributed systems. I specialise in Software Architecture, DDD, and SOLID principles to build resilient event-driven microservices using PHP, Node.js, React.js, and Next.js.

joker.title: Cross-Functional Wildcard
joker.description: I thrive in tough projects and dynamic teams. Like a wildcard, I adapt quickly to high-pressure environments, seamlessly jumping between complex backend architectures and urgent frontend features to ensure the team consistently delivers.
